% Rabi oscillator experiment (\Cref{sec:rabi-oscillator-experiment}); the blocks are the lab and RWA frames, compared within each block. For each target final-time error the (method, $s$) pair reaching it at the largest $\Delta t$ is marked ``--'' and every other row reports the ratio of that largest $\Delta t$ to its own required $\Delta t$; $a(b)$ denotes $a \times 10^{b}$. In the RWA frame the drive carrier is absent, so the Controlled Filon method coincides with Filon and is omitted. Asterisked entries rely on extrapolation from the finest run at the design order $\mathcal{O}(\Delta t^{2(s+1)})$.
